actor.goal: to capture post-ship observation and promote meaningful signals back into source narrative

story.iWant: to capture post-ship observation and promote meaningful signals back into source narrative
story.soThat: live cognition becomes a closed loop from value back to narrative

acceptanceCriteria.statement: Telemetry Observer owns only: runtime observations, feedback signals, post-ship status, source promotion candidates.
Telemetry Observer must not own: canonical truth before promotion, release authority, silent product changes.
Every materialized output must be receipt-backed.
No invisible execution path is allowed.

forbiddenClaims: Telemetry Observer owns canonical truth before promotion
Telemetry Observer owns silent product changes
